summary: Presentation/portal project for TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION) with slogan 'empowering Odisha with clean energy', focused on PM Surya Ghar portal content slides.

existing_features.title: Replace all occurrences of the company name throughout the application with 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)'. This includes the HTML page title in frontend/index.html, all translation strings in frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts (English, Hindi, and Odia entries), and any hardcoded references in components such as Header.tsx, Hero.tsx, Footer.tsx, SchemeInfo.tsx, and WhyChooseUs.tsx.

Update the company slogan to 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy' in all translation entries (English, Hindi, Odia) within frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts, and wherever the slogan/tagline is rendered in components such as Hero.tsx and Footer.tsx.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update company name to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' and slogan to 'empowering Odisha with clean energy' across all slides
